parsed_review.summary:
CP00-545 (RP17.P08.M04.S13-RP17.P08.M06.S08, risk B, 40 units) is a clean descriptor-only AI-governance pack and the pack-level claim (production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, descriptor layer) is fully supported by read-only source and evidence inspection.

Implementation: registry/service/validators add CP545 functions that produce frozen descriptors with all runtime/write/dispatch/real-data flags false. Grep for writeFile/exec/fetch/db/object-storage matched only descriptor fields set to false and validators enforcing them (e.g. runtime_execution !== false -> error); no actual I/O, network, child_process, or persistence exists. Manual recount of the 40 units confirms micro-phase counts (M04=10, M05=22, M06=8) and deliverable distribution (implementation 18, hermes_evidence 19, test 2, claude_review 1) exactly match the plan baseline, manifest, registry REQUIREMENTS, and validator enforcement.

Tests are real, not stubs: model.test.js (3 CP545 tests) asserts coverage validity, descriptor_only/runtime_execution=false per row, and authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false; validate-rp17-ai-governance-core-contract.mjs deep-equals contract JSON vs plan JSON vs code-generated descriptors and asserts current_pack=CP00-545. command-evidence.json records all required local validation commands plus rp17 validate at exit 0 with no_real_data:true and writes_product_state:false.

Authority boundary correct in every layer: Claude is read-only (Read/Grep/Glob), claude_is_final_approver=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, human final approval required, enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation=true. Hermes patterns appear only as deterministic descriptor evidence/review packets (H17/C17, receipt_shape descriptor_only...no_write, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false); no product runtime embedding. Review-hardening forbidden_review_evidence covers auth failures, zero-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and missing fields; readiness auth preflight passed with well-formed JSON.

Changed-file scope is correctly isolated to the ai-governance package, contract, and validator; unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room UI, workbook docs, docx) are preserved-as-unrelated and were not treated as in-scope. The absent claude-review-result.json/adjudication.md/construction-inspection.json are expected post-review artifacts (hardened_review_sequence steps 4-7), confirmed against the completed CP00-544 file set. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. Note: this is an independent read-only review and not final approval; human approval remains required before any enterprise trust/runtime opening.
